name: vscode-hologram
description: Syntax highlighting, intelligent autocomplete, diagnostics, and Go to Definition for the Hologram framework

scripts.postversion: git push && git push --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --notes "$(node scripts/extract-changelog.js)"
scripts.release: git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "$(node scripts/generate-commit-message.js)" && npm version ${npm_config_bump:-patch}

enumDescriptions: Jump to the def template function
Jump to the def init function
hologram.defaultJumpTarget.description: Default jump target when Cmd+clicking a component tag

description.description: Description shown in the completion popup

default.name: $click
default.description: Triggered when an element is clicked

default.name: $change
default.description: Triggered when the value of an input element changes

default.name: $submit
default.description: Triggered when a form is submitted

default.name: $select
default.description: Triggered when text is selected in an input or textarea

default.name: $blur
default.description: Triggered when an element loses focus

default.name: $focus
default.description: Triggered when an element receives focus

default.name: $mouse_move
default.description: Triggered when the mouse cursor moves over an element

default.name: $pointer_down
default.description: Triggered when a pointer is pressed down on an element

default.name: $pointer_up
default.description: Triggered when a pointer is released from an element

default.name: $pointer_move
default.description: Triggered when a pointer moves while over an element

default.name: $pointer_cancel
default.description: Triggered when a pointer event is cancelled

default.name: $transition_end
default.description: Triggered when a CSS transition has finished

default.name: $transition_start
default.description: Triggered when a CSS transition has started

default.name: $transition_run
default.description: Triggered when a CSS transition is created

default.name: $transition_cancel
default.description: Triggered when a CSS transition is cancelled

hologram.eventTypes.description: Hologram event types shown in autocomplete. Order determines sort priority. Add, remove, or reorder to match your usage.

hologram.customComponents.description: Define additional components (e.g. from deps) with their props for validation and autocomplete.
